blended.narrative: Chestnut Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,940 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
